columns.extraction_plan: The total number of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) is 502. This can be extracted from: Page 5, Table 1, "SOC-alone n = 502" row. Page 5, Figure 1 (CONSORT diagram), "Allocated to SOC N = 502" box. Page 6, Table 2, "SOC-alone n = 502" row. Page 4, Text, Section 3 "RESULTS", first paragraph: "Of these, all 1003 patients with metastatic disease were analysed here: 502 (50%) allocated to standard treatment (SOC-alone group)..."
